title: Filter board API by title
excerpt:
I would like to know if it is possible to make a call to the board API filtering by partial title. For example, I would like to search for all boards with the word “task” in the title. 
I didn’t see anything mentioned in…

posts.author: imatos (imatos)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to know if it is possible to make a call to the board API filtering by partial title. For example, I would like to search for all boards with the word “task” in the title.

I didn’t see anything mentioned in the documentation, and I searched a bit in the forum but didn’t find anything.

posts.author: Billchenau (Bill)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey @imatos

Bill here from monday.com

I’m afraid there’s no filter argument for the boards query that would allow you to search for specific board titles.

I hope this helps. Let me know if you have any further questions.

Cheers,
Bill
